# Enterprise Program API 1.0 release notes

**Article**

The initial version of the Enterprise Program API.

## Overview

This REST API provides resources that enable you to automate actions you take in developer.apple.com

### New features

- The API supports provisioning, including managing bundle IDs with the [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/bundle-ids] and [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/bundle-id-capabilities] resources, managing pass type IDs with [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/passtypeids] resource, managing certificates with the [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/certificates] resource, registering test devices with the [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/devices] resource, and managing provisioning profiles with [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/profiles].
- Manage your users and their access with the [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/users] resources. Invite users to join your team with the [doc://com.apple.devpubs.enterprise-api/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/user-invitations] resource.
title: Enterprise Program API 1.0 release notes
